title: Wastelands of Baedoor
description: Steampunk themed mod adding firearms and airships
body:
![Wastelands of Baedoor Banner](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/845768581147787264/953318639698866176/Wastelands_of_Baedoor.png)

Conquer blimps, fight gangs and be the fastest gunslinger in Minecraft! Protect your lands with special block making areas unspawnable, or fight mobs with brand new weapons! You can also gather previously unfarmable resources in vanilla-friendly ways!

Wastelands of Baedoor is mod that focuses on adding steampunk/wild westy features, mainly balanced guns and airships, allowing you to feel a bit different edge of Minecraft without losing what makes this game so magical.  
Additionally, WoB adds renewability of several resources, filling the gap of vanilla not allowing you to farm sand, calcite and other items. Once again, it is done in most vanilla-mimicking way and feedback is appreciated!

**Current version**: v0.ca1  
**Supported Minecraft versions\***: 1.20.1

Note to those knowing WoB previously: Modrinth will be used to store only 1.20.1+ versions of WoB, which are complete rewrite of the mod. Visit CurseForge to see older releases.

---

\* You can download pre-1.20.x releases from CurseForge:
- [1.18.2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wastelands-of-baedoor/files?version=1.18.2)
